reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku; tool fetches general Akita spots. No cherry blossom filtering applied — results include castle ruins, Lake Tazawa, Mt. Chokai, fireworks. Only one spot (秋田城) has sakura_meisho potential via kinds but it's not tagged. Constraint (sakura season) completely ignored.
missing_data: Cherry blossom tagged spots: Kakunodate (sakura_meisho_100), Hirosaki Castle. No sakura_meisho_100 kind filter used. Other Tohoku prefectures (Aomori, Miyagi, Iwate) not called despite multi-prefecture query.
improvement_hint: Filter by kinds=['sakura_meisho_100'] or use search_area with query '桜 東北'. Fan out to multiple Tohoku prefectures (Aomori, Akita, Iwate, Miyagi) to cover the regional scope.

reasoning: Good coverage: 越の三梅 (Koshi no Kanbai, Kubota, Hakkaisan) correctly identified with QIDs and brewery details. MAFF GI items (Kurosaki Chamame) are off-topic but expected from a specialty tool without category filter. Core sake brands well-grounded in Wikidata with descriptions.
missing_data: No explicit brewery visit/tour information or addresses. Niigata sake brand count is ~90+ but only 4 sake items shown — tool returned 24 total but truncated. Missing notable brands: Nishi no Seki, Shirataki, Kakurei.
improvement_hint: Add category filter 'food' with sub-filter 'sake_brand' to suppress non-sake items. Increase sake brand coverage for Niigata beyond 24 records.

reasoning: Query asks for ski resorts WITH hot springs in Hakuba. Response returns Hakuba Happo-One (ski resort, correct) but no onsen-tagged spots. Hot spring constraint not addressed — no onsen or hot_spring kinds in response. Municipal scrape result is a PR announcement, not useful.
missing_data: Onsen data for Hakuba area: Hakuba Happo-One Onsen, Mimizuku no Yu, Kamishiro Onsen. No onsen_kind filter applied. Response misses the dual ski+onsen constraint entirely.
improvement_hint: Call get_spots with kinds filter for onsen after ski resort fetch, or use search_hybrid with '白馬 温泉 スキー'. Add onsen tags to Hakuba municipality spots in data layer.

reasoning: Query asks for autumn foliage (紅葉) spots in Kansai region. Tool fetches general Kyoto spots — returns Nijo Castle, To-ji, Nagaoka-kyo (no foliage tags). No koyo/autumn filtering applied. Single prefecture misses Osaka, Nara, Hyogo which are part of Kansai.
missing_data: Koyo-tagged spots: Tofuku-ji, Eikan-do, Rurikoin (Kyoto), Minoo (Osaka), Yoshino (Nara). No autumn foliage kind filter. Multi-prefecture fan-out for Kansai region not applied.
improvement_hint: Use search_area with '紅葉 関西' or filter by koyo/autumn_foliage kinds. Fan out to Nara, Osaka, Hyogo for full Kansai coverage.

reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Kansai (Arabic). Nara is excellent choice: Mt. Yoshino (sakura_meisho_100, prominent 1.1) returned first with correct kinds. Other Nara spots are off-topic (Takamatsuzuka kofun, Kofuku-ji) but Yoshino as top result is the definitive Kansai sakura destination. Reasonable single-prefecture sampling.
missing_data: Osaka (Osaka Castle Park), Kyoto (Maruyama Park, Heian Shrine) not covered. Only Nara fetched — Kansai is multi-prefecture but Yoshino is genuinely the top answer.
improvement_hint: Fan out to Kyoto and Osaka with sakura_meisho_100 filter to give the agent full Kansai cherry blossom coverage beyond Nara.

reasoning: Query asks for stargazing spots on Okinawa's remote islands. Response fetches general Okinawa spots: castles (Nakagusuku, Zakimi), Tamaudun mausoleum, Kumejima town. No dark_sky or stargazing tags present. Kumejima (nagisa_100) is tangentially relevant as a remote island but not as a stargazing spot specifically.
missing_data: Dark sky spots: Iriomote, Taketomi, Yonaguni, Miyako islands — all known for stargazing. No dark_sky_kind filter. No offshore island filtering to narrow to 離島.
improvement_hint: Add dark_sky_site kind to relevant Okinawan island spots. Use get_spots with municipality filter for specific islands (Taketomi-cho, Yaeyama) rather than prefecture-wide.

reasoning: Thai-language query for rural Hokkaido onsen accommodation. Response returns hito_yu_kai members (Shiuchi Onsen 800yr history, Ginkonyu, Yugen Ryounkai at Tokachidake, Yumoto Wakkomachu at Asahidake) — all genuinely rural hidden-onsen inns. ANA Holiday Inn is urban noise but secondary. Good grounding from hito_yu_kai authority.
missing_data: No website URLs for most hito_yu_kai entries. Missing coordinates for rural inns — hard for agent to give map context. Could supplement with Dohmansen (道満泉) and other known Hokkaido rural onsen.
improvement_hint: Enrich hito_yu_kai entries with websites and coordinates via merge pass. Filter out urban hotels (lodging_type=hotel) when rural onsen is requested.

reasoning: Query asks for Seto Inland Sea islands. Tool fetches Kagawa general spots: Ritsurin Garden, Manno Lake, Marugame Castle — none are islands. Seto Inland Sea islands (Naoshima, Teshima, Ogijima, Shodoshima) not returned. The constraint 'islands' is completely missed.
missing_data: Island spots: Naoshima (art island), Teshima, Shodoshima, Ogijima. No island kind filter applied. Hiroshima (Ōkunoshima, Miyajima) and Okayama also have Seto islands not covered.
improvement_hint: Filter by kinds=['island'] or use search_area with '瀬戸内海 島'. Fan out to Hiroshima and Okayama for full Seto Inland Sea coverage.

reasoning: Query asks for indigo dyeing workshops in Tokushima. Response returns METI-designated crafts: Awa Hon-ai Shijira Weave (indigo textile), Otani Ware (ceramics, off-topic), Awa Washi (indigo-dyed paper, tangential). The indigo-weaving designation is correct but there's no workshop/experience location data. Agent cannot tell user where to do workshops.
missing_data: Workshop venue names and addresses for indigo dyeing (藍染体験). Specific studios in Tokushima city. Awa Ai (阿波藍) cultivation sites. Craft halls with visitor access.
improvement_hint: Add experience_venue or workshop_available flag to craft records. Supplement METI data with municipal scrape for 体験施設 in Tokushima.

reasoning: German query for shukubo on Mt. Koya. Response is excellent: returns confirmed Koyasan Shukubo Association members (Annyoin, Ichijoin, Ekoin, Kitamuroin, Kumagaiji) with phone numbers, descriptions in Japanese, and source URLs. All from authoritative 高野山宿坊協会. Directly answers the query with real named temples.
missing_data: No English descriptions for individual temples. No coordinates (limits map display). Website links missing for most. Name_en null for all — agent must transliterate.
improvement_hint: Add name_en to koyasan_shukubo entries. Geocode shukubo addresses to add coordinates. Add English descriptions via translation pass.

reasoning: Query for samurai districts outside Kyoto. search_area returns 153 results: top hit is Matsue 武家屋敷 (Shimane, buke_yashiki + preservation_district, must_see), followed by Tokyo gate (less useful), then Echizen Uchiyama-ke (Fukui), then Kakunodate (Akita, sakura_meisho_100 + preservation_district). Strong coverage of off-the-beaten-path destinations.
missing_data: Hagi (Yamaguchi), Kitsuki (Oita), Chiran (Kagoshima), Kaga Hitomachi (Ishikawa) samurai districts. Description for Matsue entry is null — agent lacks context to explain the site.
improvement_hint: Add descriptions to buke_yashiki entries lacking them. Boost preservation_district + buke_yashiki combination in ranking to surface district-scale entries above individual gate artifacts.

reasoning: Indonesian query for summer festivals in Akita. Response returns 3 intangible folk cultural properties (Dainichido Bugaku, Kakunodate Festival, Tsuchizaki Shinmei) — all valid Akita festivals but none date-stamped to summer. Query asks 'summer' but no month filter used. Famously missing: Kanto Festival (Aug) and Noshiro Ondo which are the iconic Akita summer festivals.
missing_data: Akita Kanto Festival (竿燈まつり), a top-3 Tohoku summer festival held in August. No scraped_schema_event results with summer dates shown. Month filter not applied.
wrong_data: Hayachine Kagura (Q11511418) in national_heritage is a Iwate-origin item, not Akita — geographic attribution issue in the national section.
improvement_hint: Apply month filter (7,8) to get_festivals for summer constraint. Scrape Akita tourism events calendar to capture 竿燈まつり and similar summer-dated festivals.

reasoning: Korean query for small fishing port towns in San'in region. Tool returns general Shimane spots: Lake Shinji, Matsue Castle, Iwami Ginzan, Mt. Sanbe. No fishing port (漁港) or coastal town content. San'in fishing village towns (Ōda, Masuda coastal areas, Hamada) completely absent. Constraint 'fishing port town' ignored.
missing_data: Coastal fishing towns: Hamada (浜田), Masuda, Yunotsu onsen-port, Tsuwano (inland but relevant). No kinds filtering for fishing_port or coastal_town. Tottori coastal fishing villages also part of San'in.
improvement_hint: Add fishing_port or gyoko kind to coastal municipality spots. Use search_area with '漁港 山陰' or '港町' to surface fishing towns in Shimane and Tottori.

reasoning: Query asks where to experience washi papermaking in Gifu. Response returns 8 METI craft items — Mino Ware, Hida Shunkei, Nagiso Rokuro Zaiku, Ichii Ittobori shown. Mino Washi (美濃和紙) is in the dataset but truncated. Even if present, no workshop/experience location data — agent can't answer 'where to experience.'
missing_data: Mino Washi Museum (美濃和紙の里会館) in Mino City for hands-on experience. Workshop venues with addresses. Mino Washi itself may appear later in the 8 items but truncated.
improvement_hint: Add experience_available boolean and workshop_url to craft records. The query is experiential; supplement METI designation data with municipal scrape for 体験施設 in 美濃市.

reasoning: Spanish query for fishing villages on Noto Peninsula. Tool returns Ishikawa general spots: Kanazawa Castle, Kenroku-en, Oyama Shrine — all in Kanazawa city, not Noto Peninsula. Noto fishing villages (Wajima, Suzu, Monzen) completely absent. Geographic constraint 'Noto Peninsula' ignored; Kanazawa ≠ Noto.
missing_data: Noto Peninsula specific spots: Wajima (輪島朝市), Suzu coastline, Myojoji Temple, Kiriko lantern festivals. Use municipality filter for 輪島市, 珠洲市, 穴水町.
improvement_hint: Use municipality-level filter (Wajima, Suzu, Anamizu) instead of prefecture-wide. Add gyoko/fishing_port kind to Noto coastal spots. Post-2024 earthquake recovery context may be worth flagging.

reasoning: Query for lesser-known sand dunes beyond Tottori. search_area returns 91 results with good diversity: Onjuku Beach (Chiba), Ishikari sand dune museum (Hokkaido), Fukiagehama (Kagoshima, nagisa_100), Tsujido Beach (Kanagawa). Tottori appears first (expected) but others follow. Good multi-prefecture breadth for a niche query.
missing_data: Nakatajima Sand Dunes (Hamamatsu, Shizuoka) — one of Japan's three major dune areas. Sakata sand dunes (Yamagata). Description_en null for many entries limits agent usability.
improvement_hint: Add description_en to sand_dune kind entries. Boost non-Tottori sand dune entries in ranking when query includes 'beyond Tottori' constraint signal.

reasoning: Chinese query for traditional crafts in San'in region. Shimane returns 4 METI crafts with Chinese translations: Iwami Yaki (ceramics), Sekishu Washi (paper, UNESCO ICH), Unshuu Soroban (abacus), Izumo Ishidoro (stone lanterns). All with high-confidence Chinese descriptions. see_also includes Iwami Ginzan. Excellent match to query intent.
missing_data: Tottori (the other San'in prefecture) not covered — Inshuu Washi and Tottori-specific crafts missing. No craft venues shown. Query says '山阴地区' which spans Shimane + Tottori.
improvement_hint: Fan out to Tottori for 山陰 regional query. Add Tottori's METI-designated crafts to cover full San'in scope.

reasoning: Query asks for lavender fields beyond Furano in Hokkaido. Tool returns general Hokkaido spots: Showa-shinzan, Sapporo Clock Tower, Matsumae Castle. No lavender_farm or lavender_field kinds returned. Furano is excluded by query but no relevant alternative lavender sites appear — lavender kind filtering not applied.
missing_data: Lavender fields: Nakafurano (中富良野), Kamifurano (上富良野), Biei Blue Pond area lavender farms, Yoichi lavender. No lavender_farm kind in data to filter on.
improvement_hint: Add lavender_farm kind to Hokkaido flower farm spots (especially Kamifurano, Nakafurano, Biei). Use search_area with 'ラベンダー 北海道' or get_festivals with lavender kind filter.

reasoning: Filipino query for traditional old towns in Kyushu. Tool returns Oita spots: Usuki Castle, Usa Jingu, Oka Castle — no traditional townscape content. Query intent is 古い町並み (traditional streetscapes). No preservation_district or kominka kinds appear. Usuki has a stone Buddha preservation district but not surfaced. Wrong prefecture — Nagasaki (Dejima), Saga (Arita), Fukuoka (Yanagawa) not covered.
missing_data: Traditional townscapes: Usuki (重要伝統的建造物群), Hita Mameda (日田豆田), Obi (飫肥) in Miyazaki, Yanagawa, Arita. Multi-prefecture fan-out needed for Kyushu 古い町並み.
improvement_hint: Use search_area with '古い町並み 九州' or filter by preservation_district + jokamachi kinds. Fan out to Nagasaki, Fukuoka, Miyazaki.

reasoning: Japanese query for kominka (old private houses) to stay in Hokuriku. get_hotels returns Ishikawa onsen ryokan (hito_yu_kai: Shiromine Onsen, Nakamiya Onsen) and generic hotels (AB Hotel, 'Student housing 1'). No kominka lodging type returned. 'Student housing 1' is noise. Fukui and Toyama (also Hokuriku) not covered.
missing_data: Kominka stay options in Hokuriku: Kanazawa machiya lodgings, Shirakawa-go gassho-zukuri minshuku (Gifu, adjacent), Nishi no Kuruwa in Kaga. No kominka lodging_type in data.
wrong_data: 'Student housing 1' entry (name_en) is clearly erroneous data from OSM — should be filtered.
improvement_hint: Add kominka or machiya_stay lodging_type. Filter out OSM entries with null names or student_accommodation type from hotel results. Fan out to Toyama and Fukui for full Hokuriku coverage.

reasoning: Query for mountain shrines on Kii Peninsula. get_japan_heritage returns Wakayama with top_canonical_heritage including Kongōbu-ji, Kumano Kodō (UNESCO WHS), Kumano Sanzan — exactly the right answer. Tool scope note correctly flags UNESCO vs nihon isan distinction. Rich heritage context with coordinates and kinds.
missing_data: Nachi Taisha (individual shrine) coordinates. Yoshino (Nara side of Kii Peninsula) mountain shrines. Omine-san (女人禁制山岳) religious mountain context. Mie prefecture Kumano shrines not in Wakayama query.
improvement_hint: Fan out to Mie prefecture for the eastern Kii Peninsula Kumano Hayatama Taisha coverage. Add Nachi Falls and Seiganto-ji as individual entries with coordinates.

reasoning: Query for summer fireworks on Sea of Japan coast. get_festivals returns 129 Niigata events but first visible items are spring flower festivals (芝桜まつり May, ヒメサユリ May). Long-awaited Nagaoka Fireworks (Aug 2-3) appears third but buried. No Sea of Japan coast filtering applied — Yamagata, Ishikawa, Fukui coastline festivals not covered.
missing_data: Omagari Fireworks (Akita, Sea of Japan side), Tsuruoka fireworks (Yamagata), Niigata fireworks along coast. Sorting/ranking by summer month not applied, spring events dominate visible results.
improvement_hint: Apply month filter (7,8) to get_festivals. Sort by date for summer constraint. Fan out to other Sea of Japan prefectures (Akita, Yamagata, Ishikawa).

reasoning: Query for traditional bamboo crafts in Oita. Response returns 2 METI craft items: Hakata Ori (weave, partially Oita-associated) and Beppu Bamboo Crafts (別府竹細工) — the latter is exactly what the query seeks. Beppu Bamboo has full English description, 8 weaving techniques, production area (Beppu, Oita). Highly accurate and specific.
missing_data: Workshop venue for Beppu Bamboo Craft (別府市竹細工伝統産業会館). No address or website for hands-on experience. Hakata Ori is primarily Fukuoka — its Oita inclusion is minor.
improvement_hint: Add workshop venue data for Beppu Bamboo Craft hall. Include website URL for the craft's official museum/experience center in Beppu.

reasoning: Query for cycling routes in rural Shikoku. Tool returns Ehime spots: Ozu Castle, Yuzuki Castle, Omishima Island (cycling_route kind, relevant!), Uwajima Castle. Omishima is genuinely on Shimanami Kaido cycling route. However, dominant results are castles not cycling routes. Tokushima, Kochi, Kagawa cycling routes (Shimanto River, Iya Valley) not covered.
missing_data: Shimanami Kaido route details, Shimanto River cycling (Kochi), Iya Valley (Tokushima). Cycling_route kind appears on Omishima but not systematically filtered. Multi-prefecture fan-out needed.
improvement_hint: Filter by kinds=['cycling_route'] across all Shikoku prefectures. Add Shimanami Kaido as a dedicated cycling_route entity spanning Ehime-Hiroshima with waypoint coordinates.

reasoning: Query for kabuki outside Tokyo/Kyoto. get_traditional_arts returns all 183 intangible arts — kabuki appears as item 2 but is genre-level (UNESCO ICH) with no venue/location data. Results are dominated by unrelated dance forms (Chakkirako, Dainichido Bugaku, Hayachine Kagura). No venue-specific kabuki theater data outside major cities returned.
missing_data: Kabuki venues outside Tokyo/Kyoto: Shochikuza (Osaka), Enshiza (Nagoya), Kanamaru-za (Kagawa, Japan's oldest kabuki theater), Kotohiragu kabuki. Location data absent from art records.
improvement_hint: Add venue_location and prefecture fields to UNESCO intangible art records. Create a kabuki_theater kind for physical performance venues. Filter response to kabuki-related items when keyword is specific.
